title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medtronic India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Medtronic India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
